name: Lazy Salmon Cakes
recipeIngredient: 7 1/2 oz Can salmon, no skin, bones
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the mashed potato.
2. Add lemon juice, onion, and seasonings (dill, cilantro/parsley) to the mashed potato.
3. Mix in the beaten egg.
4. Form the mixture into 4 patties or 6 smaller ones.
5. Heat a large saute pan over medium heat.
6. Spray or wipe with canola oil.
7. Fry the cakes for 5 minutes on each side until golden brown.
8. Serve with lemon wedge.
Makes 2 servings for hungry eaters, 3 smaller ones.
